content: FastAPI BackgroundTasks execution order: (1) path operation runs, (2) response sent to client, (3) yield dependency cleanup code (session close) runs, (4) background tasks execute. The database session provided by a get_session yield dependency is CLOSED before background tasks start. Any background task that tries to use the session passed from a route handler will encounter a closed/expired session. Prevention: background tasks must create their own session using AsyncSessionLocal() as session, not receive the session as a parameter from the route dependency.
